Domestic Box Office $48,071,303Details

Worldwide Box Office $97,531,134
Domestic Physical Disc Sales

Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $14,769,662
Total $39,840,853

Opening Weekend:$19,828,687 (41.2% of total gross)
Legs:2.42 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:49.3% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$28,000,000 (worldwide box office is 3.5 times production budget)

Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $72,868,537

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: April 16th, 2010 (Wide) by Lionsgate
International Releases: August 12th, 2010 (Wide) (Peru)
Video Release: August 3rd, 2010 by Lionsgate Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: R for strong brutal violence throughout, pervasive language, sexual content, nudity and some drug use - some involving children
(Rating bulletin 2107, 2/10/2010)
Running Time: 117 minutes
Franchise: Kick-Ass
Plot point: Surprise Twist, Vigilante
Source material: Marvel Comics
Subgenre: Black Comedy
Source:Based on Comic/Graphic Novel
Genre:Black Comedy
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Lionsgate, MARV Films, Plan B Entertainment
Production Countries: United States, United Kingdom
Languages: English
